The exams are blank booklets and you write essays and define vocabulary words in them. He wants you to be extremely thorough on the exams. All the notes are posted online as well.
Professor McNiven is a nice guy and if you approach him he will answer questions and help. He grades this class on 3 exam grades at 100 points each so getting an A is difficult

The best Art History instructor I've ever had. He's fun to listen to, and not bad on the eyes either- super handsome guy. Tells great stories as he teaches- well- traveled, and has a ton of experience in the field. Take his class if you can.
His class is pretty awesome, his tests are multiple choice and if you studyread it's very easy. This class is very interesting and McNiven is pretty awesome!

Dr. McNiven has a very unique style, and is able to convey information to his students in a way that is interesting and makes them want to learn more. I have taken two classes with him, and while both were extremely challenging, I thoroughly enjoyed both. This prof. is tough, but very fair; the grade you receive in his classes is the grade you earn

As non traditional student, I was nervous about taking his class. It is not easy. But professor Mcniven breaks it down so that it's easier to understand and very entertaining. I learned so much about the cinema. I watch films now with a new found perspective. I really enjoyed this class and look forward to taking more classes with him.

Since the only grades were the 4 or 5 exams, I had to make sure I did really well on all of them. It was tough to keep track of all the names and dates I needed to memorize. But he was very passionate about the material, which made me much more interested. He was also very funny and upbeat, so I didn't get very bored.

Tests taken directly from lectures, and you study guides tell you exactly what to memorize. Be sure to memorize though, because you can lose point. Great lecturer, although sometimes a long class can drag. Great person and very open to questions and comments. Patient and funny!
His mythology course was amazing! It's nothing but lectures and tests, but he managed to make it all very fun and entertaining.
Tests are the only way to get points so you have to study super hard! But Dr. McNiven is a nice guy.

Attendance is not mandatory but necessary to pass the class. All you need to know for the exams will be taught in the lecture notes, don't really need to read the book. Also there are only 5 grades in the class, 5 test, 40 questions each, worth 20% each, but easier then it sounds as long as you study your notes from the lectures.
i loved all of his classes he is a great instructer and the reason i picked my major to be history of art.

This class isn't hard but it does require a lot of studing dates and names.  He wants very specific info on the exams so don't leave ANYTHING out.  Nice Professor but not affraid to call you out if your cell rings or if you're talking.

Excellent Prof. that is willing to help you, but he will make you work to earn as A. His exams involve memorizing the Names, Dates, Artists, Genres, and Significance of 30-35 works of art for each of the midterms. Final is not comprehensive though thank God! Also an essay is required on each exam. Doesn't take attendance but dont miss class EVER!

Course content was not that terribly exciting, but take great notes and memorize them.  He is truly one of those professors that care and is willing to take the time to help and encourage you in doing well in his class.  Tests are multiple choice, but not necessarily easy.

Not exceptionally exciting. Does indeed wear a bowtie. I took his Greek archaeology class and actually learned quite a bit. Some people said to study... Personally, I just paid attention and never looked at the book or notes outside of class and got an A on every test. Pretty good teacher.

I have taken every class Dr. McNiven teaches. He is a very thorough professor who has an expansive knowledge of the subjects he teaches. Do not miss classes, it is very hard to catch up. His exams require a combination of memorization and original thinking. They can be very difficult, but you know that you earned your marks.
be prepared to STUDY!  take excellent notes & STUDY!

you don't need the book, just take good notes.  STUDY THEM!  tell the stories to all your friends & you'll do fine.  also, he looks a little like sean connery from indianna jones & the last crusade, only taller.
Don't take his classes if you aren't prepared to learn. He's a great guy, and I think he's got a wonderful teaching style.
I've taken most of this guys classes. Very drab. Very dry material..be prepared for lots of memorization.  WATCH OUT FOR THE BOWTIE!

This class is VERY interesting, Dr. McNiven is a great lecturer.  You shouldn't get bored unless you don't like mythology.  I like this professor very much.  He is pleasant and tries to be helpful.  He knows our names!!!

One of the most positive life altering professors in my career! He believed in me when others did not. He taught me more about life by not giving me the answers but insisting I go out into life to find my own answers. I will be forever appreciative!!!

I had him in 1971.  There were 90 of us fall quarter, 25 winter quarter and 13 spring quarter.  Failed the first two tests.  I made it known to him I was trying and he was encouraging.  I ended up with a C and took the next two quarters from him (and received C's) just to prove to myself that I wasn't a quitter. He isn't either evidently.

WORST PROFESSOR IN THE COUNTRY...UNFAIR GRADING, DOESN'T TEACH, RUDE, PROBABLY HAS A MINOR CASE OF SCHIZOPHRENIA.  PLEASE DO NOT TAKE A CLASS WITH HIM, IT WILL RUIN YOUR SEMESTER.  TO STAFF: PLEASE HAVE HIM FIRED IMMEDIATELY
Greatest professor I've ever had & I've had many.
Read the book, do the work, you'll do fine.
a hard class.  his lectures are unclear.  he is mean indirectly, but he actually is a nice professor if you get to know him better.  if you read the book, you'll do fine.

I really enjoyed his class. college is not ment to be easy but it should be fair and that is what prof. steffel offered. I disagreed with almost all of prof steffels political views but he did a good job of teaching from the middle. Students should understand that prof steffel provides a course that will help them prepare for the real world.
Teach? I think that he just tries to impress himself, and any other communists that are in his classes. Would not reccomend.
Very unclear, and he did not teach the material that he said he would. His explanations for his assignments were also unclear.
I love Mr Steffel because he hates you...viva la resistance!
If you are stupid, do not take his courses, he will make fun of you so badly, you will not even know he is doing it.

Dr. Steffel does not suffer fools, so go to class and be attentive. He will blow up at least once or twice during the quarter and you do not want to be the focus of his ire. But he is a very intelligent professor and you can learn a great deal form him. His exams are very tough and he gives several quizes.
Legend
Wonderful professor who cares about his students and would go out of his way to help you.
Hilarious funny and loud makes for a very interesting class
No Comments

Worst teacher ever! She wasn't organized at all. Would cancel class a lot and didn't even bother to notify us one time that she cancelled. Would show up late for class numerous times. Made the material completely boring, the textbook was more interesting than her. Easy A class but not worth the headache of dealing with this teacher. Happy it's over
She was very helpful teacher and could get an A if you studied notes and put in time.

very interesting subject (history of rock and roll)by makes it very boring.  Assumes people have musical experience and can pick out minor details by just listening.  Cancelled tons of classes and was over 15 mins late multiple times.  Didnt make it past the beatles because so much class was cancelled. Also didnt use the book.

It seemed like the students made her nervous. She wasn't organized, the class was boring. Half the class rarely showed up. I was fairly interested when I started the class, but after the first few weeks, I wasn't interested at all. She also cancelled class a lot, which might be okay for some, but I expect to have class when I'm paying for it.

Very interesting topic, but the way she taught made is SO boring, she just rambled on and on and made the class hell. A lot of people in my class stopped showing up to class because of how bad it was, if this was taught by a different professor the class would have been better.

The class is super easy but the way she taught us was not so interesting. It got boring after a while and the tests were too easy, but thats if you attended class and barely listened you would remember stuff more than to cram everything the night before She never used a book in her class even though she highly recommended it Note were the only need

She's just great! very easy to understand & very helpful if she knows that u work hard enough. had her for 252 & 250. 252 was online, so can't say much abt that. but,250 was amazing! save all ur notes till the end! there's 1 small paper due before each unit's quiz (4 units total) easy quizzes and final! NO reason why you should get lower than a B.
knows her stuff! I wanted to take all of her classes!
Deb is a wonderful professor! She is very passionate and it is infectious! I always looked forward to her class. NOT just another elective. Fun, and you will learn a lot!

The class was history of Rock & Roll so the topic was interesting. She is genuinly interested in the class and her students and trys to make it fairly easy. She does get mad when people start skipping class & started giving Extra Credit to students who attended regularly when I had her. 3 paper assignments= VERY EASY. Exams= EASY if u study.
